//Database: By default (sqlite, no connection string) the admin host auto-points at StuffInABox.Web/stuffinabox.db relative to its own folder — see Program.cs. Set ConnectionStrings:Default to override.

AzureAd.//: Single-tenant Entra sign-in. Fill TenantId (the personal 'Standardkatalog' tenant) and ClientId (the admin app registration). No client secret needed — the app uses the ID-token flow, so enable 'ID tokens' on the registration and add redirect URI http://localhost:5180/signin-oidc.
